assertions.title: Platform-owner is hard-blocked from tenant business and tenant-admin workflow APIs

summary: Tested 4 curl-based privacy-wall assertions: platform control-plane continuity, tenant-attached superadmin tenant-workflow denial, and platform-owner fail-closed denial across tenant business/admin APIs. Raw evidence snapshots were saved under the mission evidence directory.
